CustomField.description: Formula image field. Renders nepa_risk_score__c (0–100) as a red/gray progress bar 200px wide. Red bar width = score × 2px. Gray fill completes the 200px. A score of 85 (Very High) renders an 85% red bar — visceral proof of litigation exposure that reads in one glance without decoding a number. Designed for Scene 4-B in the CEQ Permitting Innovators demo.
CustomField.formula: IF(nepa_risk_score__c > 0, IMAGE("/img/samples/color_red.gif", TEXT(ROUND(nepa_risk_score__c, 0)) & "/100 Litigation Risk", 14, ROUND(nepa_risk_score__c * 2, 0)) & IMAGE("/s.gif", " ", 14, 200 - ROUND(nepa_risk_score__c * 2, 0)), IMAGE("/s.gif", "No Score", 14, 200) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Litigation Probability Score visualized as a red progress bar (200px wide). Width = score × 2. Score of 85 = 170px red bar.
CustomField.label: Risk Score Bar
